summary: From the Yom Kippur war to Russia’s attack on Ukraine, history shows that major events in the oil and gas markets can drive enduring changes to the global energy mix, as governments and consumers look for new, more stable sources.

title: Asia Centric: AI to Make Australia the Lucky Country Once Again
title_cn: 以亚洲为中心：人工智能让澳大利亚再次成为幸运国家
summary: Australia is emerging as a surprising beneficiary of new technological shifts, even as the country faces a growth hit from the Middle East war. Rapidly accelerating data construction is driving an unprecedented demand for copper, while battery solutions are fueling a massive consumption of lithium. Escalating geopolitical tension is also providing a powerful tailwind for rare earths as Western nations hunt for secure ex-China supply – all of which is highly positive for the country’s mining sect

title: Trumponomics: Does the US Economy Rely on the Wealthy? (Podcast)

title: Indian Owner of Swiss Gold Refiner Probed for Inflating Revenue
title_cn: 瑞士黄金精炼厂的印度所有者因收入虚增而接受调查
summary: India’s markets regulator has alleged that the owner of Swiss gold refiner Valcambi SA overstated revenue, according to an interim order issued Wednesday.

title: Korea’s Wealth Fund to Tap Alternative Assets With Tokyo Office
title_cn: 韩国财富基金将通过东京办事处开发另类资产
summary: Korea Investment Corp. will open its first office in Tokyo this summer as the $232 billion sovereign wealth fund seeks to expand investments in Japan, including alternative assets such as private equity, hedge funds and private debt.

title: MAIA: OMIFCO CEO: Operation Not Impacted by Hormuz Closure
title_cn: MAIA：OMIFCO 首席执行官：运营不受霍尔木兹关闭影响
summary:
Oman India Fertiliser Company, has announced a landmark IPO on the Muscat stock exchange, as it looks to capitalize on soaring prices and growing investor interest in the sector. The listing comes at a time when disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz is reshaping global fertilizer markets and raising concerns about food security. Ahmed Said Al-Marhoubi, CEO of OMIFCO spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa about the timing of their listing.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bejjani: UAE Holding Up Well During Regional Uncertainty
title_cn: 贝贾尼：阿联酋在地区不确定性中表现良好
summary:
The Middle East business community is navigating a period of unprecedented uncertainty, as the Iran conflict disrupts supply chains, travel and investment flows across the region. Alain Bejjani, Author of NEXT: Leading Through the New Realities & former CEO of Majid Al Futtaim spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on how businesses are adapting in the current environment.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia Spring Wheat Planting Continues to Lag on Poor Weather
title_cn: 俄罗斯春小麦播种因恶劣天气继续滞后
summary: Russian spring wheat planting continues to face delays as persistent rain hinders growers, risking lower harvests.

title: Stocks Fall From Record on Broadcom Miss, Oil Dips: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 博通错失股票，油价下跌：市场总结
summary: Stocks pulled back from record levels after a weak forecast from Broadcom Inc. dented momentum in the artificial-intelligence trade that has driven markets higher this year.

title: FTSE 100 Poised to Extend Decline as Equity Sentiment Sours
title_cn: 由于股市情绪恶化，富时 100 指数将延续跌势

title: Korea Pledges Action to Curb Volatility as Won Near 2009 Low
title_cn: 韩元兑美元接近 2009 年低点，承诺采取行动遏制波动
summary: South Korea’s government pledged to curb excessive volatility as the currency approached the lowest since 2009 and as bond yields climbed.

title: China’s DeepSeek Set to Join AI Fundraising Frenzy | The China Show 6/4/2026
title_cn: 中国 DeepSeek 将加入人工智能融资热潮 |中国展 6/4/2026
summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Minmin Low give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Asia Steps Up Currency Defense as Korea, Indonesia Vow Action
title_cn: 韩国、印度尼西亚誓言采取行动，亚洲加强货币防御
summary: Asian authorities are ramping up their currency defense as high energy costs and bets that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates pressure them.

title: Oil Rally Spurs Nigeria to Weigh Refinancing High-Cost Debt
title_cn: 石油上涨促使尼日利亚考虑对高成本债务进行再融资
summary: Nigeria plans to refinance high-cost debt and raise funds to help plug its budget deficit, leveraging strong investor confidence amid elevated oil prices fueled by the US-Iran conflict.

title: Cancer Therapeutics Startup Earli on China Biotech Lead
title_cn: 癌症治疗初创公司 Earli 成为中国生物技术领头羊
summary: Cyriac Roeding, CEO and co-founder of cancer therapeutics startup Earli, gives his assessment of China's biotech developments, after predicting a decade ago that the country would become a main competitor to the US. He speaks with Yvonne Man on Bloomberg's The China Show." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Money Market-Volumes Jump to Record as Bank Lending Booms
title_cn: 随着银行贷款的繁荣，印度货币市场交易量跃升至历史新高
summary: India’s money-market turnover jumped to a record as state-owned lenders stepped up borrowing to fund booming credit demand.

title: Peso Slump Prompts Philippines to Warn Against Forex Speculation
title_cn: 比索暴跌促使菲律宾对外汇投机发出警告
summary: The Philippine central bank has cautioned banks against using foreign-exchange derivatives transactions as a tool to profit from currency volatility that has pushed the peso to a record low.

title: Traders Brace for Big Yen Swings on BOJ, Intervention Risks
title_cn: 交易员准备迎接日本央行干预风险带来的日元大幅波动
summary: Options traders are ramping up hedges against sharp yen swings over the next two weeks, positioning for the Bank of Japan’s policy meeting and the possibility of currency intervention by authorities seeking to support the yen.

title: Indonesian Market Rout Deepens as Prabowo Policy Risks Mount
title_cn: 普拉博沃政策风险加大，印尼市场跌势加剧
summary: Indonesian markets tumbled on Thursday, with the rupiah breaching the key 18,000-per-dollar level and stocks hitting a near six-year low, as mounting policy uncertainty and macro headwinds spooked investors.

title: Singapore's Ng on Balancing Security Amid Global Unrest
title_cn: 新加坡吴恩达谈在全球动荡中平衡安全
summary: Former Singapore Defense Minister Ng Eng Hen offers his perspective on the intersection of geopolitics and defense. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Nomura Investment Forum Asia' in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nomura's Wang Thinks Asia Chips Rally Mostly Justified
title_cn: 野村证券的王认为亚洲筹码上涨基本合理
summary: Nomura International Wealth Management North Asia CIO Julia Wang says the chips rally in Asia is mostly justified by earnings growth, but she thinks valuation has also reset. Wang speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Nomura Investment Forum Asia' in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Seeks to Revive Iran Talks Amid Conditional Ceasefire
title_cn: 美国寻求在有条件停火的情况下恢复伊朗谈判
summary: The US said Israel and Lebanon agreed to a ceasefire if Hezbollah also stops fighting, contingent on “a complete cessation” of fire by Hezbollah and evacuation of operatives from Lebanese territory south of the Litani River. Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What If Vanguard's Va-Va-VOOm Follows Magellan?
title_cn: 如果先锋集团的 Va-Va-VOOm 追随麦哲伦会怎样？
summary: The first trillion-dollar ETF brings excitement, but looming IPOs are unsettling passive funds.

title: Oil Drops as Israel and Lebanon Agree to Conditional Ceasefire
title_cn: 以色列和黎巴嫩同意有条件停火，油价下跌
summary: Oil fell following three days of gains after Israel and Lebanon agreed to a ceasefire if Hezbollah also stops hostilities, which would remove a key sticking point in talks to end the Iran war.

title: Base Metals Dip on Middle East Uncertainty, Tech Stock Pullback
title_cn: 基本金属因中东不确定性和科技股回调而下跌
summary: Copper and aluminum extended their retreat as US President Donald Trump continued his fraught push to reach a peace deal with Iran, while a pullback in technology stocks also weighed on sentiment.

title: China Picks State Firm to Help Coordinate Mining Deals Abroad
title_cn: 中国选择国有企业帮助协调海外矿业交易
summary: China has chosen a new state investment company to help coordinate its overseas metals and mining deals, and counter mounting geopolitical risks that threaten its ability to secure resources, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Gold Rises as Dip-Buyers Return After Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire
title_cn: 以色列-黎巴嫩停火后，黄金买家回归，金价上涨
summary: Gold pushed higher after Israel and Lebanon agreed to a conditional ceasefire, a possible step toward resolving the wider Middle East conflict that’s upended global energy markets and raised inflation risks.

title: Asean Head Warns of Food Security Challenge
title_cn: 东盟领导人警告粮食安全挑战
summary: Asean Secretary- General Kao Kim Hourn says the war in the Middle East is a "wake-up" call for the bloc to work together to ensure energy resilience and food security. He speaks with Haslinda Amin on the sidelines of  the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sunshine Silver Raises $270 Million in US IPO to Restart Mine
title_cn: 阳光银业在美国IPO筹集2.7亿美元重启矿山
summary: Sunshine Silver Mining & Refining Co. raised $270 million in a US initial public offering that priced at the low end of the marketed range, with the funds expected to be used for restarting production at an Idaho mine.

title: South Korea’s Left-Wing Wins Big in Nationwide Vote, Loses Seoul
title_cn: 韩国左翼在全国投票中大获全胜，但输掉了首尔
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung’s party won a resounding victory in key local elections across the country, piling pressure on opposition conservatives even as a setback in the Seoul mayoral race signaled the limits of its appeal.

title: Elon Musk to Retain 84% Voting Control After SpaceX IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股后，埃隆·马斯克将保留 84% 的投票控制权
summary: Bloomberg's Michael Hytha discusses SpaceX's record-breaking IPO and why Elon Musk will be retaining 84% voting control after the company goes public. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iron Ore Falls as Fundamentals Soften, Fueling Bearish Mood
title_cn: 基本面疲软，铁矿石价格下跌，加剧看跌情绪
summary: Iron ore fell to a two-month low, extending this week’s losses as rising supply and soft seasonal steel demand weighed on sentiment.

title: Bitcoin Bounces Off Four-Month Low in Bruising Week for Crypto
title_cn: 加密货币遭受重创的一周，比特币从四个月低点反弹
summary: Bitcoin slumped to its weakest level in almost four months as renewed clashes in the Middle East weighed on wider market sentiment, before bouncing off its lows.

title: SpaceX Seeks to Raise $75 Billion in Record IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 寻求通过创纪录的 IPO 融资 750 亿美元
summary: SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an initial public offering that would be the biggest of all time. Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company plans to market about 555.6 million shares for $135 each, according to its filing Wednesday with the US Securities and Exchange Commission. Bloomberg's Manuel Baigorri reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Broadcom AI Chip Outlook Disappoints Investors
title_cn: 博通人工智能芯片前景令投资者失望
summary: Broadcom shares fell in extended trading after the company delivered a disappointing forecast for artificial intelligence chip revenue. Chief Executive Officer Hock Tan said the company $56 billion in AI chips in the fiscal year that ends in October. The forecast that fell short of the average estimate of $57.6 billion. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hiranandani Group CEO on Powering India's Digital Future
title_cn: Hiranandani 集团首席执行官谈推动印度的数字未来
summary: Darshan Hiranandani, CEO of Hiranandani Group, one of India's premier real estate and infrastructure development conglomerates, discusses how his company aims to help transform the nation into a global hub for cloud computing, AI and digital services. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Nomura Investment Forum Asia' in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cerebras Says It’s Working With All AI Gear Makers Except Nvidia
title_cn: Cerebras 表示正在与除 Nvidia 之外的所有人工智能设备制造商合作
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. plans to cooperate with a wide variety of suppliers of AI data center components, opening the way for further partnerships that mirror its agreement with Amazon.com Inc.

title: Putin Turns Russia’s AI Future Into a Kremlin Family Business
title_cn: 普京将俄罗斯人工智能的未来变成克里姆林宫的家族企业
summary: President Vladimir Putin’s push for what he calls Russia’s technological sovereignty is turning into a family affair with the development of key sectors entrusted to one of his daughters and the children of close allies.

title: Netflix Aims to Use AI to Help Viewers Manage Content Overload
title_cn: Netflix 旨在利用人工智能帮助观众管理内容过载
summary: Netflix Inc. is using AI to help customers cut through the noise of content overload, said Elizabeth Stone, the streaming service’s chief product and technology officer.

title: TSMC CEO Warns Chip Supply Won’t Meet AI-Fueled Demand for Years
title_cn: 台积电首席执行官警告芯片供应多年来无法满足人工智能驱动的需求
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Chief Executive Officer C.C. Wei said the company’s global chip supply will fall short of AI-fueled demand for years to come, sustaining revenue growth for the firm.

title: Why Amazon Has Struggled to Crack India
title_cn: 亚马逊为何难以攻克印度市场
summary: More than a decade after entering the country, the company is battling Walmart’s Flipkart and other incumbents.

title: Sam Altman Says He Doesn’t Plan to Put Money Into 2026 Elections
title_cn: 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 表示，他不打算为 2026 年选举投入资金
summary: OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman says he has no plans to make any financial contributions toward this year’s US elections, even as other Silicon Valley billionaires have already pledged to spend heavily to influence midterm races that will decide control of Congress.

title: DoubleLine’s Robert Cohen on AI Debt Loads, Private Credit
title_cn: DoubleLine 的 Robert Cohen 谈人工智能债务负担、私人信贷
summary: Robert Cohen, Director of Global Developed Credit at DoubleLine, discusses the current corporate fundraising environment. He notes that despite ongoing capital raising activities in both debt and equity markets, companies—particularly high-quality ones—continue to maintain strong balance sheets and generate healthy cash flow. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. SEC Chair: Giants Like SpaceX Need To Find Revenue Model
title_cn: 先生。 SEC 主席：SpaceX 等巨头需要寻找盈利模式
summary: Gary Gensler, former chair of both the CFTC and SEC, discusses the capital markets and the regulatory challenges they face. The discussion highlights the anticipated surge in IPO activity in 2026, with reported estimates of capital raised reaching up to $75 billion. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Broadcom Slides After AI Chip Outlook Disappoints Investors
title_cn: 人工智能芯片前景令投资者失望后博通股价下滑
summary: Broadcom Inc. shares fell in extended trading after the company delivered a disappointing forecast for artificial intelligence chip revenue, signaling its efforts to gain ground in the burgeoning industry are going more slowly than anticipated.

title: New McKinsey Report Probes US Manufacturing Vulnerabilities
title_cn: 麦肯锡新报告探讨美国制造业的脆弱性
summary: Eric Kutcher, McKinsey senior partner and North America chair, said that the technology sector is the where the US remains the most vulnerable to offshore supply chain disruptions as the world up its reliance on semiconductor chips, servers and PCs built in China. Kutcher said that while the US doesn't currently have the manufacturing ability for many of these items, new 'generations' of tech innovation provide opportunity to build out the infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rockefeller’s Sharma on AI Boom, US Market Fault Lines
title_cn: 洛克菲勒的夏尔马谈人工智能繁荣和美国市场断层线
summary: Ruchir Sharma, chairman of Rockefeller International and founder and chief investment officer of Breakout Capital, joins to provide insight into the current market dynamics. Sharma references his Financial Times op-ed, arguing that despite strong tech sector profits driven by AI advancements, the earnings narrative may be less robust than investors perceive, suggesting emerging vulnerabilities in the market. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Seeks to Raise $75 Billion in IPO Plan
title_cn: SpaceX寻求通过IPO计划筹集750亿美元
summary: SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an IPO that would be the biggest of all time, as Elon Musk’s rocket, space and artificial intelligence company targets a historic debut that could clear a path for more mega-listings. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Seeks $75B in Record IPO Plan to Fund AI, Launch
title_cn: SpaceX寻求75B美元创纪录的IPO计划以资助人工智能和发射
summary:
SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an initial public offering that would be the biggest of all time, as Elon Musk’s rocket, space and artificial intelligence company targets a historic debut that could clear a path for more mega-listings.
The Starbase, Texas-based company plans to market about 555.6 million shares for $135, according to its filing Wednesday with the US Securities and Exchange Commission. At that price, SpaceX would have a market value of almost $1.77 trillion based on the outstanding shares in the filing. Bloomberg's Anthony Hughes reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korean Stocks Outgun Japan Rivals as AI Primes Surge in Profit
title_cn: 人工智能利润飙升，韩国股市跑赢日本竞争对手
summary: The artificial-intelligence boom that’s made South Korea’s stock market the envy of its neighbors looks set for more support, with the nation’s leading listed companies on course to generate more earnings than their Japanese peers this year.

title: Trade Groups Urge US to Boost Memory Chip Supply Strained by AI
title_cn: 贸易团体敦促美国增加因人工智能而紧张的存储芯片供应
summary: A global shortage of memory chips fueled by the artificial intelligence boom poses a growing risk to industries ranging from automakers to producers of medical devices, according to a coalition of US business groups who urged the Trump administration to help increase supply of the components.

title: Bill Ackman’s Pershing Square to Exit Universal Music Stake
title_cn: 比尔·阿克曼的潘兴广场将退出环球音乐股份
summary: Bill Ackman is looking to sell his stake in Universal Music Group NV just days after the Amsterdam-listed company rejected a takeover bid by the hedge fund billionaire.

title: CrowdStrike Shares Drop After Modest Sales Guidance Disappoints
title_cn: 温和的销售指引令人失望后，CrowdStrike 股价下跌
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc. shares fell after it projected second-quarter revenue that failed to impress investors who had bid up the stock in recent months amid concerns about the threat posed by hackers armed with powerful artificial intelligence tools.

title: AI CapEx Rush Seen as Continuing as Market Stresses Bubble Up
title_cn: 随着市场压力的加剧，人工智能资本支出热潮将持续
summary: The AI-driven boom will ease up at some point in the future but not yet, Diameter Capital Partners co-founder and Managing Partner Scott Goodwin said at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum on Wednesday.

title: AI Euphoria in Old World Auto Stocks Gets a Nod From Wall Street
title_cn: 旧世界汽车股中的人工智能欣欣向荣得到华尔街的认可
summary: Investors betting that more old-world auto companies are in line to benefit from the boom in artificial intelligence got another stamp of approval from Wall Street.

title: US Stops Sharing Crucial Election Threat Data With State Officials
title_cn: 美国停止与州官员分享重要的选举威胁数据
summary: Classified briefings and some cybersecurity services have ceased.

title: Nvidia’s RTX Spark Sets Up Fight Over the Soul of Windows PCs
title_cn: Nvidia 的 RTX Spark 为 Windows PC 的灵魂而战
summary: The future of the personal computer is a hot topic again, courtesy of Nvidia Corp.’s announcement this week with Microsoft Corp. The leader in AI hardware is taking another run at making the central component for laptops, promising to bring the biggest change to the devices in decades.

title: AI Data Center Parts Maker Xnrgy Said to Mull $10 Billion Sale
title_cn: AI 数据中心零部件制造商 Xnrgy 据称考虑出售 100 亿美元
summary: The owners of Xnrgy Climate Systems, a closely held manufacturer of heating an cooling parts for AI data centers, are considering a sale that could value the company at as much as $10 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: BofA CEO Moynihan on Affordability, Lending and AI Spending
title_cn: 美国银行首席执行官莫伊尼汉谈负担能力、贷款和人工智能支出
summary: Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan discusses consumer spending trends amid rising inflation, affordability issues and the impact of AI on the banking industry. He speaks with Bloomberg's Dani Burger at the Forbes Iconoclast Summit in New York. (Corrects location of interview.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Funding Boom Reaches Muni Market With Google-Tied Deal
title_cn: 人工智能融资热潮通过与谷歌合作的交易进入市政市场
summary: Google parent Alphabet Inc. is poised to enter the municipal-bond market’s prepaid energy space by participating in a $1 billion transaction out of California, a major development in the evolution of a booming segment.

title: Prabowo Warns Over Graft as $15 Billion Food Program Probed
title_cn: 150 亿美元粮食计划受到调查，普拉博沃警告贪污行为
summary: Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto warned he will not tolerate corruption, saying he got directly involved in firing the head of his flagship $15 billion free meals program aimed at alleviating poverty and malnutrition.

title: Becerra, Hilton Take Early Lead in California Governor Race
title_cn: 贝塞拉和希尔顿在加州州长竞选中领先
summary: Republican Steve Hilton and Democrat Xavier Becerra surged to the top of California’s crowded gubernatorial primary, with billionaire Tom Steyer trailing in a contest shaped by money, scandal and uncertainty.

title: China Sanctions First New Zealand Lawmakers Over Taiwan Trip
title_cn: 中国因台湾行制裁首批新西兰议员
summary: China has imposed its first travel bans on New Zealand lawmakers after they visited Taiwan, escalating Beijing’s efforts to isolate Taipei and deter foreign governments from engaging with the self-ruled democracy.

title: Kim Jong Un Tours New Nuclear Site, Says Output Capacity Doubled
title_cn: 金正恩视察新核电站，称输出能力翻倍
summary: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un has unveiled what state media described as a new nuclear materials production facility as he pushes to expand the country’s nuclear arsenal, amid reports China’s president may travel to Pyongyang in coming weeks.

title: Satellite Images Fuel Speculation of Xi Visit to North Korea
title_cn: 卫星图像助长习近平访问朝鲜的猜测
summary: Satellite imagery appears to show construction at a square in central Pyongyang that has served as a focal point for visits by foreign leaders, fueling speculation that Chinese President Xi Jinping may soon make his first trip to North Korea in more than six years.

title: Ex-MI6 Chief on Iran Conflict, China’s Intelligence Push
title_cn: 军情六处前局长谈伊朗冲突和中国情报推动
summary: Sixth Street Senior Strategist and Former MI6 Chief Richard Moore unpacks the escalating Iran war and China’s intelligence offensive. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Nomura Investment Forum Asia' in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AMLO Breaks Silence to Back Sheinbaum Amid Tensions With US
title_cn: 在与美国关系紧张之际，奥夫拉多尔打破沉默支持希恩鲍姆
summary: Mexico’s former President Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador, who repeatedly pledged to stay out of politics after leaving office, issued a public statement backing President Claudia Sheinbaum and criticizing growing US pressure on her government.

title: Trump Says He Plans to Make Blanche ‘Permanent Attorney General’
title_cn: 特朗普称他计划任命布兰奇为“永久司法部长”
summary: President Donald Trump announced that he planned to soon make Todd Blanche “permanent attorney general” months after he assumed that post in an acting capacity, according to a video posted by a White House aide on Wednesday night.

title: Japan, Philippines Tests Xi on Taiwan as Trump Treads Softly
title_cn: 特朗普态度温和，日本、菲律宾在台湾问题上考验习近平
summary: As the Trump administration tones down its public stance on Taiwan, key US allies Japan and the Philippines are becoming more vocal in challenging Chinese President Xi Jinping on his most sensitive issue.

title: India Earmarks $1 Billion to Shield Airlines From Fuel Shock
title_cn: 印度拨出 10 亿美元保护航空公司免受燃油冲击
summary: India will provide 100 billion rupees ($1 billion) to support oil retailers for capping jet fuel prices and shield local airlines from mounting cost pressures.

title: Kyiv Seeks Patriot Missiles From Germany to Boost Air Defenses
title_cn: 基辅寻求德国爱国者导弹以增强防空能力
summary: Ukraine has asked Germany to provide dozens of additional Patriot interceptor missiles from its stocks this year as Kyiv seeks to bolster its air defenses against intensifying Russian strikes, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Georgia’s Kemp Calls Bid to Block Data Centers ‘Insane’
title_cn: 佐治亚州的坎普称封锁数据中心的投标“疯狂”
summary: Georgia Governor Brian Kemp, a defender of data centers in one of the states where they’re growing fastest, said Democratic nominee Keisha Lance Bottoms was “irresponsible” for proposing a pause in building new facilities.

title: LinkedIn China Spying Threat Prompts Warning From US, Allies
title_cn: LinkedIn 中国间谍威胁引发美国及其盟友的警告
summary: The US and its “Five Eyes” intelligence partners issued what they said was an unprecedented joint notice warning about attempts by Chinese spies to use websites such as LinkedIn to recruit assets.

title: Israel and Lebanon Agree to Ceasefire Deal as US and Iran Trade Strikes
title_cn: 随着美国和伊朗的贸易打击，以色列和黎巴嫩同意停火协议
summary: The US said Israel and Lebanon agreed to a ceasefire if Hezbollah also stops fighting, the latest attempt by the Trump administration to keep peace talks with Iran on track as political opposition to the war intensifies.

title: US: Israel, Lebanon to Have Ceasefire If Hezbollah Stops
title_cn: 美国：如果真主党停止以色列和黎巴嫩将停火
summary: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to implement a ceasefire if Hezbollah also agrees to stop hostilities, according to a joint statement from both countries and the US. Bloomberg's Romy Varghese reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: House Passes Iran War Powers Measure, Rebuking Trump | Balance of Power: Late Edition 6/3/2026
title_cn: 众议院通过伊朗战争权力措施，斥责特朗普权力平衡：最新版 2026 年 6 月 3 日
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Republican Representative Michael McCaul of Texas, spoke about Congress' War Powers vote and warns that it could 'undermine' and 'take away leverage' from President Donald Trump during ongoing negotiations with Iran, Ned Lamont, Democratic Governor of Connecticut, talks about his state's proposed legislation to enforce a 100% tax on payments received from Donald Trump's $1.8B 'weaponization fund,' and Jeanne Shaheen, Democratic Senator of New Hampshire, speaks about Congress' War Powers vote. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. Shaheen: President Needs to Rethink Policy on Iran
title_cn: 参议员沙欣：总统需要重新考虑对伊朗的政策
summary: Democratic Senator Jeanne Shaheen of New Hampshire, a member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, speaks about Congress' War Powers vote as well as the State Department not providing any information on foreign policy matters, saying it is 'not acceptable.' She also discusses her proposed legislation to cap the price of insulin for Americans suffering from diabetes. Senator Shaheen speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Order Directs Customs to Crack Down on Tariff Cheats
title_cn: 特朗普命令指示海关打击关税欺诈行为
summary: President Donald Trump signed an executive order designed to tighten customs enforcement, his latest move to ramp up protectionist trade policies.

title: Trump Plans $700 Million to Build Coal Plants, Export Site
title_cn: 特朗普计划斥资 7 亿美元建设燃煤电厂和出口基地
summary: President Donald Trump is preparing to use Cold War-era authorities to dole hundreds of millions of federal dollars to support coal-fired electricity as well as US exports of the fossil fuel.

title: Gov. Lamont: Weaponization Fund is Not a Dead Issue
title_cn: 拉蒙特州长：武器化基金不是一个死问题
summary: Ned Lamont, Democratic Governor of Connecticut, talks about his state's proposed legislation to enforce a 100% tax on payments received from Donald Trump's $1.8B 'weaponization fund.' He also discusses data centers, saying they would have to find ways to produce their own energy to prevent 'demand issues' for the state. Governor Lamont speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. McCaul: War Powers Vote from House is Ill-Timed
title_cn: 众议员麦考尔：众议院的战争权力投票不合时宜
summary: Republican Representative Michael McCaul of Texas, a member of the House Foreign Affairs Committee, spoke about Congress' War Powers vote and warns that it could 'undermine' and 'take away leverage' from President Donald Trump during ongoing negotiations with Iran. He speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Decline as US-Iran Clashes Drive Oil Higher | The Close 6/3/2026
title_cn: 美伊冲突推高油价，股市下跌收盘价 2026 年 6 月 3 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Former SEC Chair Gary Gensler, Raymond James Global Head of Private Capital Advisory Sunaina Sinha Haldea, Rockefeller International Chairman Ruchir Sharma, LSEG Director of Consumer Research Jharrone Martis, Citigroup US Equity Strategist Scott Chronert, Exelon CEO Calvin Butler, DA Davidson Head of Technology Research Gil Luria, DoubleLine Director of Global Developed Credit Robert Cohen, Macy’s CEO Tony Spring, & TickPick Co-CEO & Co-Founder Brett Goldberg. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed’s Beige Book Shows Steady Employment, Higher Inflation| Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/3/2026
title_cn: 美联储褐皮书显示就业稳定、通胀上升|彭博商业周刊日报 6/3/2026
summary: Today, Stuart Paul, US and Canada economist for Bloomberg Economics, and Tom Keene, co-host of Bloomberg Surveillance, break down the information out of the Fed's Beige Book Survey as most Fed regions saw higher inflation than the previous period. Will Kubzansky, Bloomberg News refined products reporters, discusses oil prices moving higher as the US and Iran seem to remain far apart on a potential peace deal. Also, Bank of America CEO and Chairman Brian Moynihan talks with Bloomberg's Dani Burger and Bloomberg Washington correspondent Tyler Kendall sits down with Xcel Energy CEO Bob Frenzel. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: War Powers Vote Should Send Trump a Message, Senator Shaheen Says
title_cn: 参议员沙欣表示，战争权力投票应该向特朗普传达一个信息
summary: US Senator Jeanne Shaheen, a New Hampshire Democrat and ranking member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, reacts to the House of Representatives voting 215-208 to halt the US war with Iran, breaking with President Donald Trump on an unpopular foreign conflict. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Downplays Threats of Hormuz Mines, Touts Alternate Route
title_cn: 特朗普淡化霍尔木兹地雷的威胁，兜售替代路线
summary: President Donald Trump downplayed the threat posed by Iranian sea mines in the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping, even as other US officials have warned of their dangers.

title: Republican-Led House Votes to Stop Iran War, Rebuking Trump
title_cn: 共和党领导的众议院投票停止伊朗战争，谴责特朗普
summary: The move won’t end US military attacks and still faces a Senate vote.

title: Trump Says Hormuz Will Open as Soon as Peace Deal Signed
title_cn: 特朗普称和平协议签署后霍尔木兹海峡将开放
summary: President Donald Trump says in theory Iran is getting pretty close to signing on paper and the Hormuz Strait will open immediately upon signing during remarks with reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. Morocco Ambassador: ‘Time Is on Its Side’ With Iran
title_cn: 先生。摩洛哥大使：对伊朗“时间站在一边”
summary: Former US Ambassador to Morocco and Senior Iran Adviser to President Obama, Puneet Talwar, discussed the complexities surrounding ongoing US-Iran negotiations for an interim deal. Despite reports of suspended talks due to fighting in Lebanon, President Trump remains optimistic about continuous conversations with Iran. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
